text:
A Michael Kors Bag, Suede Slippers and More Holiday Gifts at Walmart — Starting at $9



Ariana Brockington

Trending News Reporter

The Paris Olympics has come to a close and Team USA is walking out as the most decorated country from this summer's Games.

Rounding out weeks of competition, the United States finished Aug. 11 with 126 medals, followed by China with 91 and Great Britain with 65.

Going into the final day of Olympic Games, China led the gold medal count with 40, just one more than the U.S. had at the time. But with aTeam USA victory in women's basketballSunday, the U.S. secured a tie for 40 gold medals in total, the same as China.

Below, find where the medal counts stand at the end of the Paris Olympics.

Peacock is streaming the Paris Olympics around the clock.Learn more about accounts here. TODAY earns a commission on purchases. Peacock is owned by our parent company NBCUniversal.

The latest tally comes after the IOC's decision tostripgymnastJordan Chiles of her bronze medalwon on women's floor finals due to a technicality — a ruling that U.S. Olympic officials say they will appeal.

Previously, on Aug. 9, the United States won three gold medals — the women's 4x100 relay, Rai Benjamin in the men's 400-meter hurdles and Olivia Reeves in the women's weightlifting competition.

On Aug. 8, Team USA won three gold medals, three silver medals and three bronze, adding nine more medals to the total count.

On Aug. 5, women's gymnastics events officially wrapped, with Team USA rounding out what Simone Biles is calling its "redemption tour." Biles, who became themost decorated American gymnastin Olympic history after she and her fellow USA teammates won gold in thewomen’s gymnastics team final eventearly in the Games, earned her fourth medal in Paris whenshe scored silver in the floor exercise final.Jordan Chiles had received bronze in that event, and the day before, Suni Lee secured bronze during the women's even bars final.

Team USA's swimmers have also made history: In the 800-meter freestyle swim on Aug. 3, Katie Ledecky won her ninth gold medal andbroke the record for the most goldsby an American female swimmer.

Other big highlights have come out of the track and field events, too. Noah Lyles and Fred Kerley claimed gold and bronze, respectively, during the men's 100m event, Sha’Carri Richardson took silver during the 100m event and Tara Davis-Woodhall secured gold in the women’s long jump, among other noteworthy moments.

This year, the athletes are receiving custom medals, which were designed by French jewelry house Chaumet, that have an 18-gram hexagonal chunk ofiron from the Eiffel Towerembedded in each of them. Each medalist is also receiving agold boxthat includes the official poster for the 2024 Paris Olympics.

The Paris Olympics still have much more to come. Check back for updates on the running medal count for the U.S.

For the full breakdown, visit here.

CORRECTION(Aug. 7, 2024, 10:25 a.m. ET): An earlier version of this article misspelled U.S. surfer Caroline Marks' first name. It has since been corrected.

Ariana Brockington is a trending news reporter at TODAY digital. She is based in Los Angeles.

title: Paris Olympics Final Medal Count: How Many Does Team USA Have?
description: Here's the medal count for the 2024 Paris Olympics, including the number of gold, silver and bronze medals won by Team USA so far.
